title: median function breaks when the column contains NULL values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_median ( id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE, category VARCHAR(50) );
UPDATE test_median SET value = NULL WHERE category = 'A';

SELECT AVG(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_median WHERE category = 'B' ORDER BY value LIMIT 2 - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_median WHERE category = 'B') % 2 OFFSET (SELECT (COUNT(*) - 1) / 2 FROM test_median WHERE category = 'B')) AS median_values;
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_median WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: median function fails with NULL values in column
